meaning: 鍧庡笗鎷塠涔屽共杈鹃閮絔
examples: It was in the centre of Kampala.
It is the Kampala Hilton at 295 feet!
A doctor treats a victim at Mulago hospital in Kampala.
That's a message that Rosenblith, who is back in Kampala, Uganda, carries with him, too.
Freda Luzinda worked at the U.S. Embassy in Kampala, Uganda, for two years processing adoption visas.
